mapper.insert: insert into invoiceinfo (invoiceHead, invoiceNo, bankName, bangNo, unitAddress, unitPhone, isSpecial) values (#{invoiceHead}, #{invoiceNo}, #{bankName}, #{bangNo}, #{unitAddress}, #{unitPhone}, #{isSpecial})
mapper.update:
update invoiceinfo
invoiceHead = #{invoiceHead},
invoiceNo = #{invoiceNo},
bankName = #{bankName},
bangNo = #{bangNo},
unitAddress = #{unitAddress},
unitPhone = #{unitPhone},
isSpecial = #{isSpecial},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from invoiceinfo where id = (select invoiceId from studentinfo where studentinfo.id = #{studentId})
